name: @ts-fix/fix-applier-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-fix's --fix applier (RULE-005 ≤2-pass convergence + RULE-032 auto-fix-only taxonomy). Strangler-fig slice — the pure splicer (applyFixes/groupFixesByFile) stays a plain synchronous function; the file-writing shell (applyFixesToFiles) becomes an Effect over @effect/platform FileSystem + Path, curing CWE-59 (symlink/out-of-root reject) and the non-atomic write (temp-then-rename) over legacy's direct io.write.
